description_long: This object is a large, cuboid cardboard box with a natural brown kraft paper finish, featuring printed branding and product information for 'Meneau Sirop de Pêche Bio Équitable.' The box is adorned with various labels, including images of peaches, organic certification logos, and fair trade symbols. The main product label, with a peach illustration, is prominently displayed on one side, while the other sides contain detailed text and additional branding. The box appears to be sealed and is designed for bulk storage or shipping of organic peach syrup. The surface is matte and slightly textured, typical of corrugated cardboard packaging. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on eco-friendly and organic product messaging.
description: A large, brown cardboard box with organic peach syrup branding, featuring printed labels and eco-friendly graphics.
description_view_0: This view shows the side with the 'BIO Equitable' logo and extensive product information, with no fruit imagery visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the main product label with a peach illustration and the 'Meneau Sirop de Pêche' branding.
description_view_2: This view displays the product label partially, with more text and branding details visible on the adjacent side.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the side with multiple certification logos and a large 'Meneau' logo, with no fruit imagery.
